tagline: The following engine upgrades are now rolling out globally, with availability expanding to all regions over the coming weeks.
what_it_does: The following engine upgrades are now rolling out globally, with availability expanding to all regions over the coming weeks. Lower latency: Dashboards, ETL jobs, and mixed workloads now run faster, with up to 25% improvement. The upgrade is automatically applied to serverless SQL warehouses with no additional cost or configuration.
why_it_matters: Lower latency: Dashboards, ETL jobs, and mixed workloads now run faster, with up to 25% improvement.
